headline: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

site_brief.audience: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations AI assistant
creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page for creators and coaches who want every call, DM, or voice note to become publishable content and repeatable operations. Grounded in current evidence about agentic AI, workflow automation, and computer‑use agents, the page positions Super as the sharper, more durable alternative: a personal AI agent that actually operates a computer and reuses a computer‑use cache so repeated creator workflows get faster and cheaper over time.
